global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with various shapes and text elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging viewers to engage with trending content.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Central green shape
elements.description: A large green oval shape positioned centrally, with a smooth surface and a subtle gradient.

elements.label: Central green rectangle
elements.description: A medium-sized green rectangle located in the center, with rounded corners and a flat appearance.

elements.label: Left green shape
elements.description: A smaller green oval shape on the left side, featuring a smooth texture and a lighter shade.

elements.label: Right green rectangle
elements.description: A medium green rectangle on the right side, with a flat surface and rounded edges.

elements.label: Top left small circle
elements.description: A small green circle located at the top left, with a solid color and smooth finish.

elements.label: Bottom central shape
elements.description: A small green oval shape at the bottom center, with a glossy appearance.

elements.label: Bottom left small circle
elements.description: A small green circle positioned at the bottom left, featuring a flat surface.

elements.label: Central small rectangle
elements.description: A small green rectangle located centrally, with a smooth texture.

elements.label: BingeLayer UGC
elements.description: Bold text reading 'BingeLayer UGC' in a large, clear font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Watch what's trending
elements.description: Text stating 'Watch what's trending Cancel anytime' in a medium-sized font at the bottom.

elements.label: Get offer button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Get offer' in a bold font, located at the bottom of the ad.
